purpose: Short voice-provider bakeoff samples before full narration generation.

sampleLines.en_calm_opening: Long ago, in a quiet mountain village, two children waited for their mother to come home.
sampleLines.en_suspense: Outside the door, a soft voice called again, but the children knew something was wrong.
sampleLines.en_bedtime_closing: High in the sky, the children shone gently, watching over the village until morning.
sampleLines.ko_calm_opening: 옛날 깊은 산골 마을에, 어머니를 기다리는 오누이가 살았어요.
sampleLines.ko_suspense: 문밖에서 다시 부드러운 목소리가 들렸지만, 오누이는 어딘가 이상하다는 걸 알았어요.
sampleLines.ko_bedtime_closing: 하늘 높이 올라간 오누이는 아침까지 마을을 포근하게 비추었답니다.

entries.text: Long ago, in a quiet mountain village, two children waited for their mother to come home.
entries.notes: Local baseline sample only. Useful for functional comparison, not production-quality narration.
entries.agentAssessment: Best local English baseline among installed macOS voices, but still synthetic_draft and not production quality.

professionalProviderStatus.blocker: No MCP voice-generation tool and no provider credentials are configured in this environment.
professionalProviderStatus.recommendedEnglishFirstTest: ElevenLabs and OpenAI TTS short samples before full narration generation.
professionalProviderStatus.recommendedKoreanFirstTest: NAVER CLOVA Voice plus ElevenLabs/Google/Azure Korean comparison.
professionalProviderStatus.finalRecommendation: Use human narrator import for production final narration.
